So the repair is to flatten input and convert indices to 1-D (size 4), then reshape output back — but per task requirement, we only modify the test case parameters (not add logic). Hence, the minimal repair is: fix parameter name to 'indices', flatten input shape to [125], and make indices shape [4] (since 2×2=4) to satisfy both APIs’ expectations for element-wise 1-D indexing.
